Location: Mt Apo, above Kidapawan City, Cotabato, Region XII
Remarks: This bird was calling from the mid-story, down a steep slope in mid-elevation forest on the west side of Mt Apo, Mindanao. I was unsure what the bird was when I recorded it, but Desmond Allen identified it from the recording. See <http://ebird.org/ebird/view/checklist/S10347684> for further details and a complete species list for the location.
